name: genesis-cli
description: Genesis CLI, a next-generation coding CLI built on pi-mono

scripts.build: npm run build -w @pickle-pee/pi-ai && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/kernel && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/tools && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/runtime && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/ui && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/config && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/extensions && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/evaluation && npm run build -w @pickle-pee/genesis-cli
scripts.check: npm run check:lint && npm run check:format && npm run check:types
scripts.check:types: tsc --build --clean && tsc --build && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); ['packages/pi-ai/src/index.d.ts', 'packages/pi-ai/src/index.js', 'packages/pi-ai/src/index.js.map'].forEach((path) => fs.rmSync(path, { force: true }));"
